titleStmt.title: SII 26.327: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 327. (A.R. No. 309 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Māṟavarman Tribhº Sundarapāṇḍyadēva I (?): Year 19, 1234-35 A.D. (?).

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of the village Nariyaṉpākkam belonging to Iraṇḍāyiravēlippaṟṟu by the nāḍu (inhabitans) of the paṟṟu as maṭhappuṟaiṟaiyili to Mudaliyār Perumāḷ-Tādar. The signatory, by order, was Chittira mēḻivēḷāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ cuntarapāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu 10 9 vatu Iraṇṭāyiravelippaṟṟil
nariyaṉpākkam mutaliyār perumāḷ tātarkku maṭappuṟa Iṟaiiliyākak kuṭuttom Ivvūrkku varum kaṭamai poṉvari nāṭṭuvari
paḻavari putuvari maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Upātikaḷum Iḻantu maṭappuṟa Iṟaiiliyākak kuṭuttom Iraṇṭāyiravelippaṟṟil
nāṭṭavarom Inta Iṟaiyilikku Ilaṅkaṇañ coṉnār Uṇṭākil keṅkaikkaraiyil kurāṉpacuk koṉ
ṟāṉ pāvaṅkoḷvāṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai paṇiyāl cittirameḻi veḷāṉ Eḻuttu
Ivūril Eṟumpuṟakkal Uṉaittaṟi Iṟai taṭṭārppāṭṭam māvaṭai maravaṭai Erimiṉ pāṭṭam veṭṭi Ari mukkaittuṇṭam Āya Ivaiyum Iḻantu maṭappuṟa Iṟaiili
yākac cantirātittavarai celvatākak kuṭuttom Ivai paṇiyāl cittirameḻi veḷāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 26.327 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
